He previously served as Vice President and Chief Economist at the African Development Bank and as Chief Economist for the Middle East and North Africa at the World Bank.

recent_news.title: SK hynix receives 2026 IEEE Corporate Innovation Award
recent_news.summary: SK hynix Inc. has announced today that it received the Corporate Innovation Award at the '2026 IEEE1 Honors Ceremony'. The post SK hynix receives 2026 IEEE Corporate Innovation Award appeared first on EE Times.
recent_news.body_text:
Seoul, April 26, 2026 – SK hynix Inc. (or “the company”, www.skhynix.com ) announced today that it received the Corporate Innovation Award at the ‘2026 IEEE 1 Honors Ceremony’ held in New York on the 24th (local time).

recent_news.title: When the Rules Fail: Tax Incentives and Defense Sustainment
recent_news.summary: In the 1986 World Cup, Diego Maradona scored his infamous “Hand of God” goal — an obvious handball that went uncalled, because the referee did not have the tools to see it. Today, soccer has addressed that vulnerability with sensors and video review, ensuring the game is adjudicated fairly. U.S. defense industrial policy faces a similar challenge. recent_news.title: Retrial over death of Argentina legend Maradona begins
recent_news.summary: The first trial - which saw members of Maradona's medical team accused of poor care - collapsed after a judge let cameras into the court.
recent_news.body_text:
A retrial into the death of the football legend Diego Maradona began on Tuesday, a year after the first case collapsed in a mistrial.
Seven members of his medical team are charged with negligent homicide after he died from a heart attack, aged 60. They have denied the allegations. If convicted, they face between eight and 25 years in prison.
